<!-- Harbor Guardians PR template — M0 packet §4: "PR template includes: linked
     spec/doc, affected invariants, test evidence, reviewer sign-off."
     Every PR opens as a DRAFT (CLAUDE.md §4); the owner promotes and merges. -->

## Linked doc / decision

<!-- Governing doc section(s) + decision ID(s) this change implements,
     e.g. "M0 packet §7; D39". A non-trivial PR with no governing doc is a
     doctrine gap — stop and escalate instead of opening it (CLAUDE.md §6). -->

-

## Affected invariants

<!-- Invariant IDs this PR touches, turns green, or newly registers
     (E/L/M/C/S/OPS/CARGO/TD/A11Y/DC/OB/GEAR/W/FCT/GDN suites).
     Write "none" only if genuinely none. -->

-

## Test evidence

<!-- Claim-to-test (CLAUDE.md §3): exact commands run + exit codes, and the
     harness/CI output proving each claim. A feature PR must show its
     invariant stub(s) turning green. -->

-

## Scope statement

<!-- Which milestone/step authorizes this work, and confirmation the PR does
     not exceed it (no gameplay, no Alpha work during M0 — CLAUDE.md §7). -->

-

## No secrets confirmation

- [ ] I confirm this PR contains no secrets, tokens, keys, credentials, or `.env` content, and touches no other project's infrastructure.

## Reviewer sign-off

<!-- Independent reviewer verdict + traceability check. The owner promotes the
     draft and merges only after CI is green and review is recorded. -->

- [ ] Reviewer audit recorded (link or summary):
